title: ACKS God Mode — campaign (.acks.json)
description: Structural schema for an ACKS God Mode campaign file, GENERATED from the engine metadata (scripts/build-schema.js). Lenient by design (objects allow extra properties; only id-class discriminators are required) so it accepts any valid save the engine writes. See INTEGRATION.md for the consumer contract, the canonical-home rule, and the eventLog wrapper trap. schemaVersion 2 · generated against engine 0.24.0.

engineVersion.description: Engine release that SAVED the file (ACKS.ENGINE_VERSION). Absent ⇒ written before engineVersion (≤ v0.24); feature-detect, do not assume.

houseRules.description: kebab-case rule key → { enabled: bool } (absent ⇒ the registry default)
